entry.title: BearingPoint x SAP CodeJam: SAP Build: Create Apps, Processes and Business Sites (Oct. 2025 - Paris)
entry.content:
Hi there,@Dan_Wroblewski , @ajmaradiaga, @KevinR , @thomas_jung 

Hope you're doing well! We're the team at BearingPoint France, your SAP Gold Partner here in Paris, and we're excited to reach out about organising our first CodeJam event.

We'd love to host a session focused on "SAP Build: Create Apps, Processes and Business Sites without Coding" – it's such a hot topic right now and we know our developer community would be thrilled to dive into it!

We participated in several CodeJams with you before which were absolutely fantastic . There's something special about bringing developers together to learn hands-on, share ideas, and just connect with each other. The energy is always amazing! That's why we want to host it this time! 

Here's what we're thinking :

Topic: SAP Build - Create Apps, Processes and Business Sites without Coding
When: October 2025 (but we're totally flexible with dates based on your expert's availability!)
Where: Our office at 1 Passerelle des Reflets, 92400 Courbevoie, France
Expected attendees: Around 25 people

We'd really appreciate your help in setting this up and connecting us with one of your SAP experts who could lead the session. 

Let us know what dates might work for you – we're happy to work around your schedule.

Thanks so much for considering this, and we're really looking forward to collaborating with you.

Best regards,
Yuan ZHUANG
@achraf_doumar 
yuan.zhuang@bearingpoint.com
BearingPoint France

entry.title: Re: How to Deploy External JMS and JDBC drivers in SAP PO 7.5
entry.content:
Hi,

Our scenario is, we have to add new external .jar file for JDBC driver import along with existing drivers.

We requested basis team to provide SDA file, but they don't know where they can check SDA fie for existing one in SAP PO system.

Could you please tell me how to get existing SDA file from SAP PO 7.5.

Thanks & Regards,

Naresh R.

entry.title: Re: Creating a new Crystal Report and using two Parameter...
entry.content:
I think you only need one parameter for the “reference date”. Since the other date is 30 days before, you need to take the reference date - 30.
I don't know if SAP BI can send an empty date.

To control the value of the date parameter, you can work with a formula in "field explorer"

or directly in the record selection filter.

If SAP feeds the "empty" date with a distant date, you can do:

if {?p_currentdate}<date(1900,1,1) then
  {command.dat}>=currentdate-30 and {command.dat}<=currentdate
else 
  {command.dat}>={?p_currentdate}-30 and {command.dat}<={?p_currentdate}

If you create a formula field, you will must call it to filter records :

entry.title: how system automatically creates a quality notification if you confirm non-yield quantities?
entry.content:
Dear team,

A question from 

Learning Journeys/Configuring SAP S/4HANA Quality Management/Describing Technical Settings for Inspection Processing With Orders

Describing Technical Settings for Inspection Processing With Orde

The question:

How can you configure that the system automatically creates a quality notification if you confirm non-yield quantities?

Choose the correct answer.
-You assign a quantity layout to the plant-specific settings of the order type.
-You assign a quantity layout to the plant-independent settings of the order type.
-You assign a quantity layout to the confirmation parameters of the order type. (system answer)
 
Is it correct or 'plant-specific settings of the order type' would be the answer?
 
Thanks.

entry.title: "DFF Generation Error in SAP TM FIORI 2023"
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

After upgrading to SAP TM FIORI 2023, I'm facing an issue when posting a DFF freight cost.

The freight charge calculation schema includes a percentage-based condition using the scale FRT_%_VLR_MERC. During processing, the system ends up calculating a negative final amount, which triggers the following error:

  • Save Cancelled
    Enter reference-from line and reference-to line for charge line 920
    Line no. 920: Charge type FRT_%_VLR_MERC can't have a negative value."

It seems that the system is not validating or handling cases where the base value used in the percentage calculation results in a negative amount.

Has anyone run into a similar problem after the 2023 update?
#SAPTM2023 #FIORI2023

entry.title: Re: Disclosure Management - ESEF / ESRS in 2025
entry.content:
@lorenzo_chini 

Access to the shared folder should work with your S-user account. If not, please log a ticket (https://me.sap.com/getsupport) so files can be exchanged

 

Marc

entry.title: Re: Time confirmation with two assign 2 activity types to...
entry.content:
Dear Aoime

In SAP Plant Maintenance (PM) within S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, when you assign two activity types (A and B) to the same Work Center in the Costing tab, the system can only propose one activity type per operation during time confirmation (e.g., via IW41 or Fiori app "Find Maintenance Orders and Operations").

Why this happens:

  • The order operation references one activity type only — the one maintained in the operation detail.
  • Even if the Work Center supports multiple activity types (maintained in the Work Center’s costing tab), only the activity type entered in the order operation is proposed during confirmation.
  • The standard SAP logic assumes one activity type per operation unless the scenario explicitly allows for splitting.

Workaround Options:

  1. Split the operation into two separate operations:

    • Assign Activity Type A to one operation and Activity Type B to another.
    • This allows time confirmation separately for each activity type.

  2. Use different confirmation profiles or BAdI implementation (advanced):

    • If you're using Fiori or GUI, custom enhancement (via BAdI WORKORDER_CONFIRM) might allow dual activity-type processing logic.
    • However, this is not standard and would require development and rigorous testing.

  3. Manual adjustment (not ideal):

    • Post time confirmation for Activity Type A via IW41.
    • Then post a second confirmation manually for Activity Type B using the same operation and Work Center, by temporarily modifying the activity type in the order before confirming (requires coordination and can affect audit trail).

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ABAP ADT - New Cloud Project - No option for...
entry.content: I've added a better image of Expected popup, the second option 'SAP BTP ABAP Environment' is missing for me

entry.title: Re: Handle persons leaving the organisation when provisio...
entry.content:
Took a while to get it to work, but with some help from CY from SAP support I managed to configure provisioning based on EntraID groups.

How it works

If userA is part of EntraID group qas_users, userA will be created in S/4

If userA is locked in EntraID, userA gets locked in S/4

If userA is removed from EntraID, userA gets locked in S/4

If usera gets removed from EntraID group qas_users, userA will be locked in S/4

 

Setup

Source EntraID reads users. Target IAS_QAS has condition to only select users from qas_users group.

"condition": "($.emails EMPTY false) && ($.userName EMPTY false) && (isValidEmail($.emails[0].value)) && ($.groups[*].displayName contains 'qas_users')"

 

In transformation the user is added to IAS group sapqas

{
"constant": [
{
"id": "<group ID in IAS for group sapqas>"
}
],
"targetVariable": "assignGroup"

Now all new users initially are put in the sapqas group.

sapqas is the condition to use during reading IAS for S/4 provisioning

Source system Local_IAS_to_QAS

ias.user.filter = groups.display eq "qas_users"

All qas users are read from the qas_users group

Target system QAS-RFC

"user": {
        "condition": "(($.emails EMPTY false) || isValidEmail($.emails[0].value) && ($.groups[?(@.display ==='SAPQAS' )]))",

I now only select the users that have been put in the conditional group sapqas. If I would use the qas_users group, they would be excluded from processing if removed from the group in EntraID. 

So, need to work with the sapqas group. 

 {
                "condition": "$.groups[?(@.display === 'qas_users' )] empty true",
                "constant": "L",
                "targetPath": "$.LOCK"
            },

This condition checks if the user is still allowed to work in S/4 based on assignement of the group qas_users. If not assigned the user will be locked in S/4. Once the user is assigned again to the group, user will be unlocked by the default transformation 

 {
                "condition": "'${operationTypeVariable}' == 'updateEntity'",
                "constant": "U",
                "targetPath": "$.LOCK"
            },

 

I have multiple S/4 systems to provision from CIS. I made a local IAS target per backendsystem, so one for QAS, one for PRD etc. This makes the condition much easier.

entry.title: Re: Questionmark secure browser crashing
entry.content:
I took a workaround - do the exam on a iMac with a recent version of MacOS instead of trying to get it running on Windows.

You need an account with admin rights in order to set a few privacy flags for Zoom, and disable the popup blocked in Safari, but afterwards, you're good to go.

But if somebody from the experts here as a good link to learnosity.com and could get an actual human supporter to have a look at the error message I mentioned in my original post, it would be absolutely great.

Also, maybe we should create a list of security software that will make the QuestionMark Secure browser crash, as I have heard from others that CrowdStrike will just do that.

Sravanthi.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisition items not showing My Inbox Fiori
entry.content:
Dear Ankur,
I was able to resolve the error — I was missing some service activations in transaction SICF.

I updated task TS20000159 with the following configuration.

Then I implemented the SAP Note "2757073 - After S/4HANA 1809+ upgrade, error opening app: App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded. to activate the service featuretoggles1.

Finally, I activated the following services in SICF:

  • plm_ath_cres1
  • mm_reuse_texts1
  • nw_aps_bpm_lib

I identified the issues through the browser console.
Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Android Studio - Virtual device error MDK development
entry.content: You may need to go into the BIOS settings and ensure Virtualization is Enabled first.  Then you may also need to enable Hyper-V in windows.  Check these and also google for the error as this is a common issue.

entry.title: Assignment of owner in the activities of a test case in ALM
entry.content: I verified that it is possible to include the tester for each Test Case, but I couldn't find how to assign the Owner for the activities that make up the Test Case. For example, in Integrated Tests, we have different users to perform each activity. How can I assign this in ALM?

entry.title: Re: Reconciliation Balances on the fly translation to euro
entry.content:
Hello @Gabor5 

Thank you for your question and for sharing the screenshots.

In the Reconciliation Balances app, the "On-the-Fly Translation to Euro" option performs a real-time conversion of local and transaction currency balances into EUR using the current system exchange rate (typically the M rate). This is done dynamically at the time of report execution, not based on historical exchange rates from the original postings.

This helps provide a consistent and comparable view of intercompany balances across different company codes  especially helpful when your group currency is EUR, as in your example with a German (EUR) and Romanian (RON) entity.

Why the Balances Appear Correct Only in EUR View:

  • The dynamic EUR conversion eliminates FX mismatches caused by different exchange rates applied in the original sender and receiver postings.
  • Views using transaction currency or global currency reflect original document values, which may differ due to:
  • Different exchange rate types or dates used at posting time
  • Rounding differences
  • Local valuation rules

Therefore, discrepancies in these currencies are expected and don’t indicate errors — they’re natural outcomes of decentralised posting logic. The EUR view is purely analytical and intended to simplify reconciliation, especially for group reporting.

While the term on-the-fly may not appear explicitly in SAP documentation, this behaviour is fully supported in the logic behind scope item 2CX (Intercompany Matching and Reconciliation) and reflected in SAP Help Portal guidance.

Let me know if you need further assistance

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Best patches for BI 4.3 SP04

entry.title: I can not open Service Binding in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am starting to practice with BPT from Eclipse using ADT. When I try to open a Service Binding to publish it, I can not access the information, throwing instead the following error:

java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "com.sap.adt.util.ui.databinding.DatabindingSectionComposite$DatabindingSectionPart.getSection()" because "this.bindingTypeInfoSectionPart" is null

Could anyone guide me? I searches and found that maybe an update is needed, but I have not privileges to do that. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Beginner's Guide to EDI Integration
entry.content: Great post, to go to the next level integrating into SAP/IDOCs, check this out: https://www.contax.com/SAP-EDI-Basics

entry.title: Re: App Material Documents Overview - Ho can I indicate c...
entry.content:
Dear Dirk

Standard Limitation

  • Currently, the Manage Material Documents app (or similar apps like “Display Material Document”) does not include a column or icon that shows whether an attachment is present.
  • The attachment (via GOS or Document Management System/DMS) is only visible once you open the material document details.

Why This Happens

  • In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, customization options are limited compared to the On-Premise or Private Edition.
  • GOS (Generic Object Services) functionality is restricted in the cloud version.
  • Standard apps are delivered by SAP and cannot be freely enhanced with custom columns showing attachment status.

Here are the possible Workarounds

A. Use Document Info Records (DIR) and DMS

  • Instead of GOS attachments, manage attachments via Document Management System (DMS) and link them to material documents using Document Info Records.
  • Then use "Manage Documents" Fiori app to track and filter by document usage.

B. Custom CDS View + Custom App

  • Create a custom CDS view that reads from:
    • MKPF and MSEG (for material documents),
    • and links with SRGBTBREL or similar services tables (if accessible in public edition),
  • This CDS view could include an indicator column showing whether an attachment exists.
  • Then expose this CDS view via a Custom Analytical App or List Report.

C. SAP BTP Extension (Side-by-Side App)

  • Build a small UI5 app or dashboard on SAP BTP that uses public APIs (if available) to retrieve material documents and show an “Attachment Exists” flag.
  • This app can then be added to the launchpad via an In-App extension.

D. Raise SAP Influence Request

  • Since this is a recurring need for logistics teams, consider raising a Customer Influence request or check if one already exists on the SAP Customer Influence portal.

Best regards

entry.title: How to configure a movement type relevant for MRP
entry.content:
Hello community

I would like to know how I can configure a new movement type relevant for MRP.

For example, if I create a new movement type using another one as example (copy), in which part of Spro I should define this new movement type as relevant for MRP.

I have verified in OMJJ but I didn't find it.

Thnaks

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud, Composable Storefront Support with August 2025 Release
entry.content:
The SAP Commerce Cloud (Core Commerce, Java/Spring application) August 2025 release is scheduled to be supported for 12 months as opposed to the six (6) month Update Release mainstream maintenance cycle.

Will SAP Commerce Cloud, Composable Storefront maintain the compatibility window with the August 2025 Core Commerce release, or will it align to the typical 6 month release cycle, with compatibility only with new Framework Core Commerce (JDK 21 / Spring 6.x / Spring Security Upgrades).

entry.title: Re: Sub Consolidation in Group Reporting
entry.content:
Hello all, good explanations

When you write: "The con of this set up is that additional data will be generated which is not required. The group results will be generated in the sub-group currency as well and the sub-group data will be generated in group currency as well".

This consideration is maintained in the GR Version 2023? Is there an option when you can process "automatic" "not manual", in the Monitor with a different structure in order to not generate data which is not required?

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
Hi @jeetendrakapase ,

Great blog - thank you. We are looking forward to the release of People Intelligence for SuccessFactors. I'd like to understand how data products will be configured to align with a customer's SF configuration. We currently use WFA, and the process to configure each metrics pack is time consuming and expensive. Will something similar be required to configure each People Intelligence package, and will this have to be carried out by SAP? The SAP Roadmap for the People Intelligence package for EC says, "Include referenced picklists and custom objects", which suggests a similar configuration exercise?

Thank you,

Jeremy.

entry.title: Re: Event Mesh IS Subscribe Access Denied
entry.content:
Yes, there were new access rules introduced in a recent update of EMIS. I ended up creating a new event mesh instance with this config:

{
"namespace": "sap/em/integration",
"resources": {
"units": 10
},
"rules": {
"queueRules": {
"publishFilter": [
"*"
],
"subscribeFilter": [
"*"
]
},
"topicRules": {
"publishFilter": [
"*"
],
"subscribeFilter": [
"*"
]
}
}
}
The wildcard lets you publish and subscribe to any topic/rule of your instance.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hi @Moe_Kai,

With the 2025 Q3 QRC, which is the next phase of our Deprecation Plan, there will be a visual indicator to distinguish between a Classic Story and Optimized Experience within the File Repository, Recent Files, and so on. Within the File Repository we have also separated out the Filter Options to make it easier to find those respective assets. With the System Overview Dashboard that is provided to administrators, under Feature Adoption we provide statistics what percentage of objects that are opened are a Classic Story, Classic Application, or Optimized Experience. There are additional visualizations that identify the location of these objects.

Regards,

Tunir

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hi @GustavoSigrist,

Yes, the Deprecation Plan remains accurate and it is recommended to continue to monitor this Blog Post for recent updates. Our next phase, continues to be on track for the 2025 Q3 QRC.

Regards,

Tunir

I can connect to system/HDB database using SYSTEM/ABAPtr2023#00

entry.title: Re: How to get details of Users and their roles in ICM
entry.content:
@kr_pavankumar 

Below SQL can provide some hints to your Question and tweak according to your end... 

Kindly accept the solution and hit Like Button.

SELECT u.userid, 'Assigned Role' AS Source, d.name AS Domain, r.name AS Role
FROM csi_user u
INNER JOIN CSI_PRINCIPALROLE pr ON pr.PRINCIPALSEQ=u.userseq AND pr.principaltype=1
INNER JOIN CSI_role r ON pr.roleseq=r.roleseq
INNER JOIN csi_domain d ON r.domaintype=d.domaintype
UNION
SELECT u.userid, 'Inherited from Group', d.name, r.name
FROM CSI_User u
INNER JOIN CSI_USERGROUP ug ON u.userseq=ug.USERSEQ
INNER JOIN csi_group g ON g.groupseq=ug.groupseq
INNER JOIN CSI_PRINCIPALROLE pr ON pr.principalseq=g.groupseq AND pr.principaltype=2
INNER JOIN CSI_role r ON pr.roleseq=r.roleseq
INNER JOIN csi_domain d ON r.domaintype=d.domaintype
UNION
SELECT u.userid, 'Global', g.domain_name, g.role_name
FROM csi_user u, (SELECT d.name AS domain_name, r.name AS role_name FROM csi_role r INNER JOIN csi_domain d ON r.domaintype=d.domaintype WHERE r.isglobal=1) g
UNION
SELECT u.userid, 'Inherited from Title', d.name, r.name FROM csi_user u
INNER JOIN 
(SELECT
    upper(t0.userId) AS userId,
	t0.titleseq
FROM
	(
		SELECT DISTINCT pos.ruleElementOwnerSeq AS positionSeq,
		pos.name,
		pos.managerSeq,
		pos.titleSeq,
		**bleep**.name AS titleName,
		pos.payeeSeq,
		part.firstName,
		part.lastName,
		part.userId,
		payee.payeeId,
		(CASE
			WHEN pos.payeeSeq IS NULL
			OR (pos.payeeSeq IS NOT NULL
			AND pos.effectiveStartDate > part.effectiveStartDate) THEN pos.effectiveStartDate
			ELSE part.effectiveStartDate
		END) AS effectiveStartDate,
		(CASE
			WHEN pos.payeeSeq IS NULL
			OR (pos.payeeSeq IS NOT NULL
			AND pos.effectiveEndDate < part.effectiveEndDate ) THEN pos.effectiveEndDate
			ELSE part.effectiveEndDate
		END) AS effectiveEndDate,
		(CASE
			WHEN pos.payeeSeq IS NULL
			OR (pos.payeeSeq IS NOT NULL
			AND pos.removeDate < part.removeDate ) THEN pos.removeDate
			ELSE part.removeDate
		END) AS removeDate,
		(CASE
			WHEN pos.payeeSeq IS NULL
			OR (pos.payeeSeq IS NOT NULL
			AND pos.createDate > part.createDate ) THEN pos.createDate
			ELSE part.createDate
		END) AS createDate
	FROM
		CS_Position pos
	INNER JOIN CS_Title **bleep** ON
		pos.titleSeq = **bleep**.ruleElementOwnerSeq
	LEFT OUTER JOIN CS_Participant part ON
		pos.payeeSeq = part.payeeSeq
		AND pos.effectiveStartDate < part.effectiveEndDate
		AND pos.effectiveEndDate > part.effectiveStartDate
		AND pos.createDate < part.removeDate
		AND pos.removeDate > part.createDate
	LEFT OUTER JOIN CS_Payee payee ON
		part.payeeSeq = payee.payeeSeq
		AND payee.effectiveStartDate = part.effectiveStartDate
		AND payee.removeDate = part.removeDate
	WHERE
	    **bleep**.islast=1 and
		**bleep**.removeDate = (
			SELECT MAX(removeDate)
		FROM
			CS_Period)) t0	
WHERE
	( (t0.REMOVEDATE = date'2200-01-01')
	AND (UPPER(t0.USERID) = 'XXXXXXXX'))) usertitle ON upper(u.userid) = usertitle.userid
INNER JOIN CSI_PRINCIPALROLE pr ON pr.principalseq=usertitle.titleseq AND pr.principaltype=3
INNER JOIN CSI_role r ON pr.roleseq=r.roleseq
INNER JOIN csi_domain d ON r.domaintype=d.domaintype
ORDER BY userid, SOURCE, DOMAIN, role

entry.title: Re: Newbie in new SAP Community Group Berlin
entry.content:

We are also looking forward to TechEd in Berlin.

entry.title: How to restore task standard TS00008267 SAP Workflow
entry.content:
I'm creating a WF project. Part of the development process is creating a decision task, and I accidentally edited standard task 8267 and didn't create a Z.
I only added two new fields and modified the message. I haven't yet transferred the change to quality.
Do you know if it's possible to restore the task or how can I fix this problem? Thank you.

DEV: Changed.

 

QAS: ORIGINAL

entry.title: Re: Error with Add Member functionality in SAC
entry.content:
Hi @pragnya_m , 

Using "Add Member", you can book new values on the unbooked member combinations. You know which unbooked members you are going to add. 

When you trigger "Add Member" from a table cell, the members of the outer dimensions (those to the left of the trigger cell) are inherited from that row. The new member added for the trigger dimension will be unbooked.

In your example, you are going to book a new value for BU "Products".  So you can trigger "Add Member" from "BU" dimension in the row "Products" (the cell circled in red).  A new line will be added below, where the member of Costcenter ("CC1") will be inherited from the same row.  You can then choose "Products"(which should be unbooked) for "BU" dimension,  and choose members for the remaining dimensions. 

Sarau

entry.title: Translate Scripts SAP Personas 3.0 - FLVRT
entry.content:
Hello team,

I am facing two issues trying to translate $FLVRT:UD10 in my flavor's script.

1. I have already maintained translation for $FLVRT:UD1 (Rush Order) and $FLVRT:UD10 (Please enter the Plant)

The problem here is that when I trigger return session.findById("wnd[0]/sbar").setMessage("$FLVRT:UD10", "E"); the status bar is displaying "Rush Order0", so, it is reading UD1 translation and adding a zero at the end. Why this happens and how to avoid it?

2. There is some misbehavior in the admin transaction. I try to translate the text, but when I am in edit mode, the text boxes don’t always allow me to enter text. I log back into SAP, and it works... but after I press the save button, if I choose another line, the text boxes again don’t allow me to enter text.

Current SP: 3.0 SP 19

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Re: Invalid manager message with off cycle event batch
entry.content:
Hi Laura,

This issue was due to the line manager field being set to view only in Manage Business Configuration.  Switching visibility of this field to Editable resolves the problem.

Cheers,

David

entry.title: Re: Can we do value mapping through MDG Consolidation ?
entry.content:
Hi Saravanan,

Thanks again. If I have understood your reply correctly, kindly confirm my inline comments below:

1. This particular adapter will utilise the value mapping already maintained in the system for the mapping. If value mapping is maintained between source system and consolidating system, the adapter will map the values else the inbound value will be considered. - so does it mean that, the custom code implemented in the Adapter class does not write any value mapping entries into MDG, it only reads the value mapping maintained in MDG? I am just trying to understand this part correctly. Also kindly clarify what you meant by "else the inbound value will be considered". what inbound value are you refering to?

2. Both options has its advantage and value addition.
If using ETL tool like BODS, it will be simpler in sense of value mapping where you can review the data pre and post conversion of values. But the value mapping has to be maintained in BODS for ETL purpose and same values to be maintained in MDG for MDG replication. -  are you saying, apart from maintaining the value mapping entries in BODS, we also have to maintain the same manually in MDG? or we can just upload the value mapping file into MDG that can be generated from BODS ater the data is laoded?
If using MDG consolidation for value mapping, all changes need to be visualized in the consolidation FIORI App. Performance and sizing need to be considered for better processing. But value mapping is maintained only in MDG system. - here we have around 200K vendors that are being loaded into MDG from 3 source systems. But the value mapping(conversions) would be hardly for 10-15 attributes in vendor master. Do you still see any issue here if we do through adapter class for this small number of mapping entries?   

Looking forward to your response.

Regards, T

entry.title: Manager's name is not appearing in the Workflow "CC"
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The manager's name is not appearing in the workflow even the mapping is correct in workflow, Manager's name is appearing in the Employee's Job Information, and Managerial details are maintained like personal info, first, last name etc....

Workflow Mapping

Manager's Name is appearing in the team members job info

When workflow appears, Manager's name is not appearing in CC (Manager name is - Oliver Hamilton)

Thanks in Advance...

entry.title: How to add a new input / selection to an existing Dialog box that has already been extended?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have been tasked with extending a Fiori app with an adaptation project. The app I am looking into is "Find Maintenance Orders and Operation" (F2173).

I am trying to add a new input / selection to a dialog box that opens when a user presses "Change Assignment". This dialog is part of an extension that was created by SAP. I want to be able to add another field to the fragment using a new extension but nothing new seems to display in the dialogue box. I would also need to extend the project with a controller but the override methods that are included in the controller extension (onInit, onBeforeRendering, onAfterRendering, etc.) do not get triggered during the press of the button. The method that handles the button within the SAP logic is called "onChangeAssignmentPressed" which is also part of a controller extension by SAP. Ideally we would want to override that method but is that even possible? If not, How else can we go about this by getting the additional section in our fragment extension to work with a possible new method that would somehow reach the logic that handles the existing "Change Assignment" button? 

When the user presses the "Change Assignment" button, a dialog box is displayed with selections in which we would like to another one in this window for "Division".

 

I have noticed that the app utilizes Function Imports which we are not really familiar with but it seems like we would need to add division here as well but these are not allowed to be changed. How do we proceed without being able to make a change here (not sure if needed)?

 

The existing XML logic for the SAP extension regarding the change assignment dialog box is this:

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:smartform="sap.ui.comp.smartform"
  xmlns:smartfield="sap.ui.comp.smartfield" xmlns:layout="sap.ui.layout" id="ChangeAssignmentFragment"
  xmlns:customData="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.CustomData/1">
  <Dialog title="{@i18n>xbut.changeAssignment}" contentWidth="20em" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDialog" afterOpen="afterDialogOpened" afterClose="afterDialogClosed">
    <content>
      <smartform:SmartForm flexEnabled="false" editTogglable="false" editable="true" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentSmartForm">
        <smartform:layout>
          <smartform:Layout id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentLayout" columnsL="1" columnsM="1" emptySpanL="1" emptySpanM="0" labelSpanL="0" labelSpanM="0"></smartform:Layout>
        </smartform:layout>
        <smartform:groups>
          <smartform:Group id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentGroup">
            <smartform:GroupElement objectBindings="{viewModel>/Operationworkcenter}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmenWorkCenterGroupElement">
              <smartform:label>
                <Label text="{/#ChangeAssignmentInputType/Operationworkcenter/@sap:label}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmenWorkCenterLabel"/>
              </smartform:label>
              <ComboBox visible="{= ${viewModel>/isMassEdit} && !${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentWorkCenterMassEditComboBox" change="onMassEditComboBoxChanged" selectedKey="{viewModel>selectedKey}"
                items="{viewModel>massEditValues}" customData:smartFieldId="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentWorkCenterField">
                <items>
                  <core:Item key="{viewModel>key}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentWorkCenterMassEditItem" text="{viewModel>value}"/>
                </items>
              </ComboBox>
              <smartfield:SmartField visible="{= !${viewModel>/isMassEdit} || ${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentWorkCenterField" value="{Operationworkcenter}"/>
            </smartform:GroupElement>
            <smartform:GroupElement id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantGroupElement" objectBindings="{viewModel>/Plant}">
              <smartform:label>
                <Label text="{/#ChangeAssignmentInputType/Plant/@sap:label}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantLabel"/>
              </smartform:label>
              <ComboBox visible="{= ${viewModel>/isMassEdit} && !${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantMassEditComboBox" change="onMassEditComboBoxChanged" selectedKey="{viewModel>selectedKey}"
                items="{viewModel>massEditValues}" customData:smartFieldId="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantField">
                <items>
                  <core:Item key="{viewModel>key}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantMassEditItem" text="{viewModel>value}"/>
                </items>
              </ComboBox>
              <smartfield:SmartField visible="{= !${viewModel>/isMassEdit} || ${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPlantField" value="{Plant}"/>
            </smartform:GroupElement>
            <smartform:GroupElement id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentResponsibleGroupElement" objectBindings="{viewModel>/Operationpersonresponsible}">
              <smartform:label>
                <Label id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentResponsibleLabel" text="{/#ChangeAssignmentInputType/Operationpersonresponsible/@sap:label}"/>
              </smartform:label>
              <ComboBox visible="{= ${viewModel>/isMassEdit} && !${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPersonResponsibleMassEditComboBox" change="onMassEditComboBoxChanged"
                selectedKey="{viewModel>selectedKey}" items="{viewModel>massEditValues}"
                customData:smartFieldId="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPersonResponsibleField">
                <items>
                  <core:Item key="{viewModel>key}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPersonResponsibleMassEditItem" text="{viewModel>value}"/>
                </items>
              </ComboBox>
              <smartfield:SmartField visible="{= !${viewModel>/isMassEdit} || ${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentPersonResponsibleField" value="{Operationpersonresponsible}"/>
            </smartform:GroupElement>
          </smartform:Group>
        </smartform:groups>
      </smartform:SmartForm>
    </content>
    <beginButton>
      <Button id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentOkButton" text="{@i18n>xbut.changeAssignment}" press="onOkPressed" type="Emphasized" />
    </beginButton>
    <endButton>
      <Button id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentCancelButton" text="{@i18n>xbut.cancel}" press="onCancelPressed"/>
    </endButton>
  </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Within my new fragment I attempted to add:

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:smartform="sap.ui.comp.smartform"
    xmlns:smartfield="sap.ui.comp.smartfield" xmlns:layout="sap.ui.layout" id="ChangeAssignmentFragment"
    xmlns:customData="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.CustomData/1">
    <Dialog title="{@i18n>xbut.changeAssignment}" contentWidth="20em" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDialog" afterOpen="afterDialogOpened" afterClose="afterDialogClosed">
        <content>
            <smartform:SmartForm flexEnabled="false" editTogglable="false" editable="true" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentSmartForm">
                <smartform:layout>
                    <smartform:Layout id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentLayout" columnsL="1" columnsM="1" emptySpanL="1" emptySpanM="0" labelSpanL="0" labelSpanM="0"></smartform:Layout>
                </smartform:layout>
                <smartform:groups>
                    <smartform:Group id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentGroup">
                        <smartform:GroupElement id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionGroupElement" objectBindings="{viewModel>/zzdivision}">
                            <smartform:label>
                                <Label id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionLabel" text="Division"/>
                                <!-- <Label id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionLabel" text="{/#ChangeAssignmentInputType/zzdivision/@sap:label}"/> -->
                            </smartform:label>
                            <ComboBox visible="{= ${viewModel>/isMassEdit} && !${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionMassEditComboBox" change="onMassEditComboBoxChanged"
                                selectedKey="{viewModel>selectedKey}" items="{viewModel>massEditValues}"
                                customData:smartFieldId="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionField">
                                <items>
                                    <core:Item key="{viewModel>key}" id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionMassEditItem" text="{viewModel>value}"/>
                                </items>
                            </ComboBox>
                            <smartfield:SmartField visible="{= !${viewModel>/isMassEdit} || ${viewModel>isSingleMode} }"
                                id="orderAndOperationChangeAssignmentDivisionField" value="{zzdivision}"/>
                        </smartform:GroupElement>
                    </smartform:Group>
                </smartform:groups>
            </smartform:SmartForm>
        </content>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

I would appreciate any feedback that would help us keep moving forward. Please let me know if any additional details are needed. 

Thank you,

Patrick

entry.title: Re: Changing User Status With STATUS_CHANGE_EXTERN
entry.content:
Since your error message is 'user status is not allowed', I would assume something is wrong with your status profile ZPM_EQI (and not the corresponding business transactions - these are used to control the system status).

I would do the following:

  • Find out the current user status of your object, e.g. using report CRM_ORDER_READ
  • Check whether the status order number of your status EAPRO is within the range that is defined for your current object status.

entry.title: Re: How to restore task standard TS00008267 SAP Workflow
entry.content: Change it manually or if you prefer do a Transport of Copy from another system to revert the changes completely. Don't forget to remove the workflow task from your transport request, no need to transport it to another system.

entry.title: Re: How to Perform Partial payment Scenario in Automatic...
entry.content:
Hi @VijaykumarV

 

F-59 is not available in Sap S/4hana Public cloud. Please be aware and provide the corrected solution.

entry.title: Re: Document Currency is not changing at invoice level
entry.content: Hi Raymond, Thanks VTFA Solved the Problem !!! , Fuctional guy didn't check properly after again checking we get the custom code written for it , thank you !!!

entry.title: Bapi for Advanced Return Management order creation
entry.content:
Hello, 

I need to create from a Sales order through Bapi a return order based on the Advanced return order functionality.

Unfortunately actually we found only the BAPI to create Standard Return order but no BAPI for the ARM that can be used also to map the follow Up Activities. Can you please help us to understand if there is some functionality that fits our requirement?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 : Native barcode 128
entry.content:
Because at some point you or someone purchased/got the 128 Azalea barcode fonts and possibly a newer UFL from them.

Look in your Programs and features and see if it shows the 128 barcode installer from Azalea.

Also see if the Fonts show them...

CR only installs the code 39 from Azalea...

entry.title: use counter in value for
entry.content:
Hey there!

I have the following code

    lt_items = VALUE #( FOR ls_input IN it_input (
      item_no     = 0
      material    = ls_input-matnr
      short_text  = ls_input-txz01 ) ).

How do I get an item counter to have ITEM_NO filled for each line of IT_INPUT?

Something like

    lt_items = VALUE #( FOR ls_input IN it_input 
                        LET pos = 1 IN pos = pos + 1 (
      item_no     = pos
      material    = ls_input-matnr
      short_text  = ls_input-txz01 ) ).

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to find the custom ABAP artifacts in the SAP system using the SAP tables.
entry.content: What in tarnation is this "blog post"? Shouldn't there be some text? So confused...

entry.title: Re: How to configure a movement type relevant for MRP
entry.content:
Hi There,

MRP only consider the stocks with different criteria, can you tell me why you want to include movement for MRP consideration?

 

thanks,

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM & SuccessFactors Webinar - Q2/2025
entry.content:
Assista Agora: Webinar sobre SAP Cloud ALM e SuccessFactors

Ficou por fora do nosso webinar ao vivo? Não se preocupe! A gravação já está disponível para você assistir quando quiser. No dia 12 de junho de 2025, realizamos um webinar imperdível sobre SAP Cloud ALM e SuccessFactors, abordando todos os detalhes e funcionalidades que você precisa conhecer para otimizar seus processos de negócios.

Clique aqui para assistir

Além disso, não deixe de conferir as gravações dos nossos webinars anteriores:

Webinars de Q2/2025
Descubra as atualizações e recursos apresentados no segundo trimestre de 2025. Assista agora e fique por dentro das últimas novidades do SAP Cloud ALM.

Webinars de Q1/2025
Revise as sessões do primeiro trimestre de 2025 e veja como o SAP Cloud ALM pode transformar sua gestão de TI. Não perca essa oportunidade de aprender com os especialistas.

Aproveite para se atualizar e aprimorar suas habilidades com o SAP Cloud ALM e SuccessFactors. Estamos sempre aqui para ajudar você a alcançar o melhor desempenho em seus negócios. Fique à vontade para compartilhar essas gravações com sua equipe e colegas de trabalho.

Esperamos que essas sessões sejam de grande valor para você!

entry.title: Re: Setup your BTP Trial account and ABAP environment
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing! I thought this process was described in one of the tutorials but couldn't find any. Not sure what's up with that...

There are some instructions on SAP Learning website but I think it has way too much information. 

Quick Google search didn't find any simple and straightforward official instructions. Hm...

entry.title: Re: use counter in value for
entry.content:
INDEX INTO var is the solution

TYPES: BEGIN OF _one,
         material TYPE c LENGTH 10,
         qty      TYPE p DECIMALS 2,
       END OF _one,
       _ones TYPE TABLE OF _one WITH DEFAULT KEY.
TYPES: BEGIN OF _two,
         posnr TYPE posnr,
         matnr TYPE matnr,
         menge TYPE menge_d,
       END OF _two,
       _twos TYPE TABLE OF _two WITH DEFAULT KEY.

DATA(one) = VALUE _ones(
   ( material = 'AA' qty = 1 )
   ( material = 'BB' qty = 2 )
   ( material = 'CC' qty = 3 ) ).

START-OF-SELECTION.

  DATA(two) = VALUE _twos(
                FOR line IN one INDEX INTO idx
                 ( posnr = idx
                   matnr = line-material
                   menge = line-qty ) ).

  cl_demo_output=>display_data( two ).

entry.title: Re: use counter in value for
entry.content:
INDEX INTO is the solution

TYPES: BEGIN OF _one,
         material TYPE c LENGTH 10,
         qty      TYPE p DECIMALS 2,
       END OF _one,
       _ones TYPE TABLE OF _one WITH DEFAULT KEY.
TYPES: BEGIN OF _two,
         posnr TYPE posnr,
         matnr TYPE matnr,
         menge TYPE menge_d,
       END OF _two,
       _twos TYPE TABLE OF _two WITH DEFAULT KEY.

DATA(one) = VALUE _ones(
   ( material = 'AA' qty = 1 )
   ( material = 'BB' qty = 2 )
   ( material = 'CC' qty = 3 ) ).


START-OF-SELECTION.

  DATA(two) = VALUE _twos(
                FOR line IN one INDEX INTO idx
                 ( posnr = idx
                   matnr = line-material
                   menge = line-qty ) ).

  cl_demo_output=>display_data( two ).

entry.title: Re: How to add a new input / selection to an existing Dia...
entry.content:
you can try following steps:

hide "Change Assignment" button

add your own "Change Assignment" button

copy sap's fragment and the new field, use the fragment in your event handler to show the popup

enhance the odata service(google how to enhance segw based odata service)

call the function import in the event handler

entry.title: Error "Money Overflow; cannot display all digits"
entry.content:
In SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2111, I recently started using bin locations for stock management. However, I encountered the following error in a specific bin location:

"Error "Money Overflow; cannot display all digits" (ODBC -104) [7001-21]"

This error occurs only in one particular bin location (row), and as a result, I’m blocked from performing any stock operations (such as transfers or adjustments) with the items stored there.

How can I fix this issue?

Isso não é para acontecer, se continuar acontecendo, abra um chamado.

Mas a resposta pode estar aqui nesse blog post: Dicas de Implementação

entry.title: Re: Email Notification in BPA
entry.content: Hello.. thanks for the answer. However, I couldn't find anywhere how to configure the "SAP_NOTIFICATION_CENTER" destination. The "Workflow Mail Destination" destination is working correctly, and the email sending test is ok. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Why I cannot find the project template when I create...
entry.content:
In configuration pay close attention to what you are mapping.  In the screen shot you are mapping an Item template to a Project template.

Looks like you need to map Item type to a Project template.  And look out for mapping a PS Project/Template vs. a PPM Project Template.  

There are just a lot of mapping options.

entry.title: Re: How to concat multiple fildes in CIG mapping
entry.content: Select a condition item from the correct table, please start again! - getting this error while trying concatenation

entry.title: Re: How to add a new input / selection to an existing Dia...

I appreciate it!

Patrick

entry.title: Re: Translate Scripts SAP Personas 3.0 - FLVRT
entry.content:
I can confirm that the first problem appears to be a bug. Please create a support incident for component BC-PER about this issue and the team will provide a fix. In the meantime, an obvious workaround would be using a different translation item key - for example, UDA.

I couldn't reproduce the issue about the not editable text control so far, even after trying multiple combinations of editing translations, saving and selecting another one etc.
This could perhaps be an SAP GUI for Windows problem. Try it with the latest available Wingui release and patch level. I'm running release 800 PL 13.
Does this happen for you also while using a browser?
Also, the text item highlighted in your screen shot doesn't have any text. Do you experience the same problem with any other one that does have a text to be translated?

entry.title: Re: LMS items are opening in new page and redirecting to...
entry.content: Considering the browser settings were reviewed and the problem remains, it'd be better to open a case with Support to review it. In the case, share the steps, impacted users, and access through one impacted user for troubleshooting purposes. Two points to be added in the case: Does the impacted population consist of Learning only users? Is the near real-time enabled in the impacted system?

entry.title: Re: How to update Config data via CRM_ORDER_MAINTAIN ?
entry.content:
CRM_ORDER_MAINTAIN is the right FM and the standard way to create new orders. However, in a migration scenario, I have also seen order creation directly on database level due to performance issues.

Your problem seems to be that information that is not passed to CRM_ORDER_MAINTAIN somehow ends up in the order you created. It is important to understand that CRM_ORDER_MAINTAIN not only creates the object, but also issues events that trigger other function modules. It is possible that your config data was created in such an event callback. Please check view CRMV_EVENT_CUST for any function modules that could be responsible for creating the config data. If that doesn't help, set a breakpoint in FM CRM_EVENT_PUBLISH_OW to identify possible objects/events that could trigger the creation of your config data. Check where the data elements of the config data are used in the code, too.

Another option is a BAdI or Enhancement spot. Go to SE18 and check for definitions that relate to your problem, e.g. *config*

entry.title: Re: Creating a new Crystal Report and using two Parameter...
entry.content: Also, If I use that Formula, is going to filter the data ?, Should I add something in the COMMAND file to include that new formula?

entry.title: Re: Implementation Tips - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, inbound invoicing option for Brazil
entry.content:
Answering this question:

"Hi, quick question re Brazil ECD/ECF SPED reports - is 'SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition(SAP product code - 8008260) good enough to meet the need?"

No: to generate the files for ECD and ECF IS THE SKU 8013658 the SKU 8008260 is to handle the messaging process for EFD-REINF nowadays

Thanks

Kyono

entry.title: Re: Translate Scripts SAP Personas 3.0 - FLVRT
entry.content: Hello Tamas, I thought we could use the admin tcode with wingui but as I'm seeing is also prefer using webgui for SAP Personas admin. It is not happening using webgui. 🙂 For the bug, then I will open a support incident. Thanks for your support Tamas, Regards, Mateo

entry.title: Re: Valor mínimo de IRF não respeitado na nota fiscal - SAP B1
entry.content:
Olá,

Estava com o mesmo problema e esta solução resolveu parcialmente, porque o problema é que não acumula o IR para notas fiscais emitidas no mesmo mês para o mesmo cliente. Exemplo:

 - Emito a primeira nota em 10/05 no valor de 400,00 → o valor de IRRF será de 6,00 logo não deve reter/destacar na nota fiscal

 - Emito a segunda nota em 20/05 no valor de 400,00 → o valor de IRRF será também de 6,00, mas ao somar com o valor da primeira NF o valor será de 12,00 logo deve reter/destacar na segunda nota fiscal o valor de 12,00.

Este acumulado não está funcionando, pode ser algum parâmetro, mas já procurei e não encontrei. Pode me ajudar?

entry.title: Re: Bapi for Advanced Return Management order creation
entry.content:
Dear Marco

Have you tried the approaches below?

1. Use ARM APIs via BAdIs or Enhancement Framework

SAP does not provide a public BAPI for full ARO creation. Instead, the ARM functionality is built into specific transaction logic (like VA01 with ARM settings). Therefore:

  • Consider using BAdI BADI_SLS_ARM or other enhancements related to ARO process.
  • If you are extending the system, use custom RFC or wrapper to simulate VA01 logic with the ARM-specific fields (e.g. reason codes, refund control, follow-up types, etc.).

2. Alternative: Use SAP Standard Function Modules (with caution)

Some developers use the low-level function modules such as:

  • SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE (used internally by VA01)
  • But this FM is not released for customer use and may break with upgrades. It also needs a deep understanding of ARM tables and structures like:
    • VBAP-ARM_PROCTYPE
    • VBAP-RET_REASON
    • VBAP-FOLLOWUP

This is not officially supported and requires careful testing.

3. Use SAP Cloud APIs if on Sales Cloud or S/4HANA Cloud

If you are on SAP S/4HANA Cloud or SAP Sales Cloud integrated with S/4, check:

  • OData or SOAP APIs exposed by Communication Scenarios (like SAP_COM_0109 for sales order integration).
  • As of now, Sales Cloud APIs do not support full ARO creation, but follow-up activity configuration might be possible through extensions.

4. SAP Notes and Roadmap

Check these relevant SAP Notes:

  • SAP Note 2813396 – ARM BAdIs and extensibility
  • SAP Note 2501190 – Advanced Returns Management – Overview

These notes clarify that standard BAPI support for AROs is limited, and custom enhancement is typically required.

Best regards

entry.title: Sales order with service order versus revenue bearing service order
entry.content: I am working at a company that is utilizing revenue bearing service orders. I think they might benefit from using sales orders with service orders instead. Can anyone explain me when one should be chosen over the other? I know from both types how they work, but I am not sure what the advantage of using revenue bearing Service orders over Sales Orders with Service orders would be or the other way around.

entry.title: Re: How to add multiple texts in idoc(E1EDKT1) from PO
entry.content:
Dear sri sanjay

In your case, since both F01 and F85 header texts are configured correctly under the path "Purchasing → Messages → Texts for Messages → Define Texts for Purchase Order", the issue is not with basic configuration but with how the IDoc generation logic handles multiple header texts.

By default, the IDoc type (typically ORDERS05) and its associated function module (like IDOC_OUTPUT_ORDERS or the message type-specific FM) will only populate selected header texts into the E1EDKT1 segment. If only F01 is being transferred while F85 is ignored, it's likely that the underlying function module is not retrieving or mapping multiple header text types.

There is no standard configuration that allows you to specify multiple header text types to be included in the IDoc unless the message output program has been customized to handle that. Therefore, you will need to implement an enhancement to ensure both F01 and F85 texts are fetched and passed to the IDoc.

You should implement a user exit or enhancement in the relevant IDoc generation program. For example, use enhancement IDOC_OUTPUT_ORDERS (or its variant depending on your output type) and within that, enhance the logic where E1EDKT1 segments are being filled. Retrieve both text types from the purchase order header using READ_TEXT with object type EKKO and include both in the internal table that is used to populate E1EDKT1.

Ensure that the TDID field of E1EDKT1 is set to F01 and F85 respectively for the two texts. Also, verify that both text types exist in the PO before generation.

This approach will allow you to send both F01 and F85 texts in the same IDoc under separate E1EDKT1 segments.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: How to Configuration Approval PR in Fiori My Inbox
entry.content:
Dear Ramdhani

To configure Purchase Requisition (PR) approval steps in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition so that they appear in the Fiori My Inbox app, you need to define a flexible workflow for the PR scenario. First, ensure that the workflow for PR is activated. Go to the Fiori app Manage Workflows for Purchase Requisitions. In this app, create a new workflow by defining the name, valid from date, and conditions such as document type, plant, or total value. Add one or more approval steps, and assign the step to a role, user, or manager level using responsibility rules or user determination functions.

Ensure the workflow scenario WS00800238 is active in the SWF_PROCESS_SCENARIO transaction in the backend. Use transaction SWU3 to check and complete the necessary workflow runtime configuration including RFC destination and background jobs. Assign the proper authorization roles to users who need to receive PR approval tasks in their Fiori My Inbox.

Next, verify that the My Inbox app is properly configured. In transaction SICF, activate the OData service /IWPGW/TASKPROCESSING. Ensure that users have the proper business roles with catalogs and groups that include the My Inbox app and access to workflow tasks.

When a PR is created and meets the workflow start condition, the approval step will be triggered, and the task will appear in the approver’s My Inbox.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: HU not rehung to OD in ECC when ID is cancelled in EW...
entry.content:
Hi

When you cancel the inbound delivery in EWM that was created from VLMOVE in ECC for an HU-managed storage location, the inbound delivery document is also cancelled in ECC due to standard EWM-ECC integration behavior. However, in this process, the handling units (HUs) are not automatically reassigned or "rehung" to the original outbound delivery in ECC because the system considers the HUs as already issued or consumed during the original goods movement initiated by VLMOVE.

The system does not automatically restore or reverse the assignment of HUs to the original outbound delivery once they have been transferred. This is because the cancellation of the inbound delivery affects only the document flow, and not the full reversal of HU assignment logic. The original outbound delivery still shows the HUs as issued, and the linkage is not re-established unless you implement a manual or custom process.

To reassign the HUs back to the original outbound delivery, you would need to manually reverse the goods movement in ECC (if possible), unassign the HUs from any new documents, and then use transaction VL02N to reassign them to the outbound delivery. In some cases, you may need to create a custom report or enhancement to automate the re-hanging of HUs based on business rules, especially if the process of canceling IDs in EWM is frequent.

Additionally, check the relevant delivery and HU status in ECC to confirm the HU is not locked or posted, and verify the delivery item category settings and movement types used by VLMOVE for any additional constraints.

Best regards

entry.title: Supply Chain Logistics Maturity Model: Find your Footing at Level 1 (2 of 5)
entry.content:
If your daily logistics operations are heavily reliant on phone calls, emails, spreadsheets, and folders full of paper, you're likely operating at what the Supply Chain Logistics Maturity Model characterizes as Level 1, the "Manual" stage. At this stage, strategic planning is minimal, and tactical transacting and reacting to issues consume most of your effort. Collaboration with carriers and partners is typically limited to one-to-one communication methods, making real-time visibility a significant challenge.

Please read on to see how the prior post describing the purpose and framework for the maturity model specifically applies to companies at Level 1. 

According to industry surveys, a substantial portion of companies still rely on manual communication methods. At Level 1, these characteristics are prevalent:

  • Primary reliance on phone, email, and spreadsheets.
  • Little logistics integration with related fulfillment processes.
  • Reactive with minimal strategic planning or advanced optimization.

For companies at this level, the Supply Chain Logistics Maturity Model is particularly valuable. It helps you explicitly see where you stand and highlights the low-hanging fruit for improvement. Identifying manual processes, areas with excessive paper handling, or moments where data is being re-typed from one system to another are clear indicators of areas needing attention.

The primary focus for improvement at Level 1 is gaining efficiency. But where and how do you start? The model points towards digitalization and automation as key first steps. This isn't about finding a "perfect solution" right away; it's about starting with specific areas where you can quickly drive value. By digitalizing basic transportation processes like booking and tendering, or gaining some initial visibility beyond external portals, you lay the crucial groundwork needed to move up the maturity curve. Leveraging the model helps you pinpoint which manual processes to tackle first to gain that initial, much-needed efficiency.

Stay tuned for the next post, where we'll explore how companies at Level 2 have built a foundation for greater efficiency, and begin to leverage visibility to become more proactive.

More in-depth reading:

Decoding Supply Chain Logistics: Four Strategies to Mature Your Logistics Operations

Insights to Action eBook: Chart your path to logistics excellence

entry.title: Question Regarding Rollback Plan – Commerce Cloud Patch Upgrade
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I hope you are doing well.

We are currently working on upgrading our Commerce environment. As part of our planning and risk mitigation process, we would like to understand if there is a standard rollback plan or recommended rollback procedure provided by SAP for this patch upgrade.

Could you please share the standard rollback strategy or any official documentation that outlines the steps to revert the system in case of any failure during or after the upgrade?

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Question Regarding Rollback Plan – Commerce Cloud Pat...
entry.content:
Hello,
I hope this message finds you well!

If you encounter any problems during deployment, you can perform a rollback to the previous build to revert to a previous database state. You can find detailed information on Deployment Rollback.

To ensure a smooth upgrade process, I recommend making a backup before proceeding. This precaution will help safeguard your data in case any issues arise post-upgrade. And, for this situation, you can find further information on Rollback After a Deployment and Data Backup and Restore.

Additionally, I suggest upgrading package by package. This approach allows you to identify and address any issues incrementally, ensuring a more manageable and controlled upgrade process.

Best regards,
Izadora
SAP Support

entry.title: Redis on SAP BTP – How to Monitor Instances Using the Metrics API
entry.content:
Monitoring Redis on SAP BTP instances is crucial to ensure optimal performance and stability, especially in enterprise-grade platforms like SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform). Redis on SAP BTP provides a metrics API that allows developers and operators to monitor key metrics such as CPU usage, memory usage, and key eviction rates.

If you want to know more about eviction policy, read the below blog post:

  • Redis on SAP BTP: When and Where to use Eviction Policy

In this blog post, we walk you through how to access Redis monitoring metrics using the Extension API, retrieve a bearer token via the Cloud Foundry CLI, and execute API requests using Postman or curl.

Why monitor Redis?

Monitoring helps detect performance issues early. Metrics like high memory or CPU utilization can indicate potential bottlenecks, and evicted keys can signal capacity issues. Redis on SAP BTP offers native support for instance monitoring through a RESTful API, making it easy to integrate into monitoring tools or dashboards. 

Metrics API overview

The Redis Extension API exposes a GET endpoint:

/v1/redis-cache/instances/{id}/metrics

This endpoint returns:

  • CPU Utilization (%)
  • Memory Utilization (%)
  • Evicted Keys (count)

You’ll need:

  • Your Redis instance ID (you can retrieve it from the SAP BTP Cockpit)
  • The base URL (check the api_server parameter in your service key credentials)
  • A valid bearer token (obtained using cf oauth-token CLI command)

Example on Cloud Foundry (CF)

1. Login to SAP BTP account API endpoint, via CLI

cf login -a https://api.cf.eu12.hana.ondemand.com 

After login, select your org and space where the Redis instance is deployed, see below example:

2. Get the Bearer Token

Run the following command:

cf oauth-token

This returns a bearer token required to authenticate API requests, see below example:

3. Build the metrics API URL

If your service key JSON looks like this:

"api_server": "https://api-backing-services.eu12.data.services.cloud.sap"

Then your API URL would be (for an instance ID = 8721bd22-08b9-4e60-xxxx-d3cbbb64848a)

https://api-backing-services.eu12.data.services.cloud.sap/v1/redis-cache/instances/8721bd22-08b9-4e60-xxxx-d3cbbb64848a/metrics  

4. Run the API call

You can either use curl or Postman.

Using curl:

curl -X GET \
  'https://api-backing-services.eu12.data.services.cloud.sap/v1/redis-cache/instances/8721bd22-08b9-4e60-xxxx-d3cbbb64848a/metrics' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer eyJqa3UiOiJ...'

Using Postman:

Configure your request like this:

  • Method: GET
  • URL: your full API endpoint
  • Authorization: Bearer Token (paste token there)

You’ll get a response like:

{
  "CPU Utilization": "2.62%",
  "Memory Utilization": "1.03%",
  "Evicted Keys": "0"
}

Note: Rate Limiting

To prevent abuse, this endpoint allows 1 call per instance every 5 minutes. Keep this in mind when designing monitoring dashboards or scripts.

Conclusion

Redis on SAP BTP’ monitoring via the Extension API is a lightweight and efficient way to observe your instance’s health. With basic tools like Postman or curl and your CF CLI setup, you can gain immediate insight into how your instance is performing.

Use this data to proactively manage scaling, investigate performance anomalies, and maintain SLA compliance.

 
Thanks for reading!
For more insights from the product team on Redis on SAP BTP, don't miss to read:
  • Redis on SAP BTP - INDEX of official blog posts
Regards, 
Antonio

entry.title: SAP MII/MES Evolution: What’s Your Next Step?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

As we look to the future of our manufacturing operations, my team’s excited to explore new possibilities with SAP Digital Manufacturing and other innovative solutions to keep our shop floors thriving. Big thanks to SAP for supporting us as we plan this journey!

What’s your team’s approach to evolving your manufacturing systems? Are you diving into SAP’s latest tools, checking out other platforms, or just starting to brainstorm? Share your ideas, successes, or questions—let’s inspire each other! 🚀

#SAPMII #SAPMES #DigitalManufacturing

entry.title: Error when deploying simple Fiori Elements app
entry.content:
Hello,

I am doing the Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps course from learning.sap.com. In week 3 unit 4 "Deploying your SAP Fiori elements app", when I execute:

 

npx fiori add deploy-config

 

And select Cloud Foundry, instead of going to the next step, I get the following:

 

Adding deploy-config to the project.
info Add:Deploy-config Using: /fiori:deploy-config
? Please choose the target Cloud Foundry

No change to package.json was detected. No package manager install will be executed.

 

I don't know what is causing this. I had to download Yeoman as a dependency before executing this command, maybe it has to do with that or with npm. My package.json file:

{
  "name": "bookinganalysis",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "description": "An SAP Fiori application.",
  "keywords": [
    "ui5",
    "openui5",
    "sapui5"
  ],
  "main": "webapp/index.html",
  "devDependencies": {
    "@sap-ux/ui5-middleware-fe-mockserver": "2",
    "@sap/ux-ui5-tooling": "1",
    "@ui5/cli": "^3.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "fiori run --open \"test/flp.html#app-preview\"",
    "start-local": "fiori run --config ./ui5-local.yaml --open \"test/flp.html#app-preview\"",
    "build": "ui5 build --config=ui5.yaml --clean-dest --dest dist",
    "start-mock": "fiori run --config ./ui5-mock.yaml --open \"test/flp.html#app-preview\"",
    "deploy": "fiori verify",
    "deploy-config": "fiori add deploy-config",
    "start-noflp": "fiori run --open \"index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false\"",
    "start-variants-management": "fiori run --open \"preview.html#app-preview\""
  },
  "sapuxLayer": "CUSTOMER_BASE",
  "sapux": true
}

entry.title: [CPI] HTTP "Don't Throw Exception on Failure" doesn't work properly on XI Sender Synch
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a synch XI Sender scenario, where the ERP sends a message to the CI, which makes an HTTPS request (with the option "Don't Throw Exception on Failure" enabled), and receives an HTTP Code 400 with a payload informing the reason for the error. I need delivery this message to ERP.
Analyzing the flow in the CI monitors, I don't see any errors, everything occurs as it should. However, when delivering the return message in the XI channel, an exception is generated on ERP, on proxy call.
This happens for example for HTTP Codes 400 and 404, but works perfectly for HTTP Code 500.
The payload received on 400 and 404, is shown on SXI_MONITOR as HTMLError, and no as MainDocument, as expected.

I think this is not happening as expected.
Has anyone noticed this behavior? Any known solutions?

Thanks,
Miguel Motta

entry.title: Adding localized Best Practices at SAP Signavio Process Explorer
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm at a project where we need to import SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (localized for Brazil) at Signavio Process Explorer, for posterior edition with client.

The solution scenario would be this: https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-055/2023-FPS02?region=BR

I've performed the install of Value Accelerator "Process design and standardization for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" at Signavio Collaboration Hub, which would cover it, but the result is that it only contains the processes for Germany and USA.

What would be the correct procedure to have those Best Practices localized for Brazil (and other countries, as I suppose the issue is the same for other countries)?

entry.title: Can we create Key Mappings for multiple systems in MDG Consolidation?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can anyone tell me if we can create Key Mappings for multiple source systems while doing dataload via MDG Consolidation? The reason why I am asking this, because I do not see any option to put multiple source system names in the Consolidation UI. There is only one source system's name that we can put.

Your valuable advice is greatly appreciated.

Thanks!! T
